queries.question: Please list all air traffic controllers and also display ground staff members who earn $60,000 annually.
queries.sql:
SELECT Air_traffic_controller.name
FROM Air_traffic_controller
UNION
SELECT Ground_staff.name
FROM Ground_staff
WHERE Ground_staff.Salary = "60000 per year"

queries.question: Display the air traffic controllers and ground staff whose salary is $60,000 per year.
queries.sql:
SELECT Air_traffic_controller.name
FROM Air_traffic_controller
WHERE Air_traffic_controller.Salary = "60000 per year"
UNION
SELECT Ground_staff.name
FROM Ground_staff
WHERE Ground_staff.Salary = "60000 per year"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display the air traffic controllers and ground staff whose salary is $60,000 per year.
